name: Sour Cream Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Mix together 1 cup sugar, butter, sour cream, and vanilla in a large bowl.
3. Add egg to the mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt) to the wet mixture. Stir until just combined.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or sugar.
6. Roll each portion of dough gently in additional sugar using the flat side of a knife or spoon.
7. Place the coated dough about 2 inches apart on the baking sheet.
8. Flatten each cookie to about 1/4-inch thickness using the bottom of a glass or the palm of your hand.
9. Bake for 7 to 8 minutes, or until set and lightly golden.
10. Allow cookies to cool slightly before removing from the baking sheet.
